## Title: Add critical error logging to M2AP ERROR_INDICATION handler

### Summary
The `eNB_handle_ERROR_INDICATION` function in the M2AP module is called when a critical ERROR_INDICATION message is received from the MCE (Multi-cell/Multicast Coordination Entity). Previously, this function would immediately trigger an `AssertFatal` without logging any context about the error, making it impossible to debug which connection or stream triggered the failure in production environments.
